name: blossom_lv100
description: A/B leg A for the TBCS-from-dialog hang: battle the first Blossom Path trainer (Jabari, sq_regular_meadow, Hoppip/Sentret lv11-12) with a LEVEL 100 Garchomp leading. If rct/tbcs cap-gates dialog battles, this hangs or refuses; if not, autobattle wins and defeated_sq_regular_meadow lands. Second party slot (magikarp lv3) only exists to satisfy the dex_gte_2 dialog band via real dex registration.

steps.comment: -- reset + setup: fresh or reused player both fine; clear the defeat tag so the picnic-day battle entry shows --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon magikarp level=3
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side (autobattle) while the stale dialog stays up

steps.wait_chat: The meadow looks after its own
